title: Documented-Override Schema Constraint — promote RULE-CI-DOCUMENTED-OVERRIDE-NOT-COMPLIANCE-1 to automated
description: Authors schemas/_definitions/forbidden-audit-paint-names.schema.json as a shared Draft 7 propertyNames constraint that rejects override/audit-paint field names. Applies the constraint via $ref to rule.schema.json and deliverable.schema.json. Promotes RULE-CI-DOCUMENTED-OVERRIDE-NOT-COMPLIANCE-1 from working-model to automated via schema-constraint mechanism. Completes the CI-gating axis pair started by FU-D-2: where FU-D-2 added a runtime gate (CI workflow), this adds a structural gate (schema rejects the construct entirely). Closes FU-RULE-DOCUMENTED-OVERRIDE-SCHEMA-CONSTRAINT-1.

outputs.description: schemas/_definitions/forbidden-audit-paint-names.schema.json — shared Draft 7 constraint via propertyNames pattern rejecting audit-paint field names.
acceptanceCriteria: Defines propertyNames pattern rejecting override/audit-paint names
Positive test (allowed names) passes; negative test (override field) rejected

outputs.description: schemas/rule.schema.json v1.1.2 → v1.2.0 — references the forbidden-audit-paint-names constraint via allOf composition.
acceptanceCriteria: All 5 existing rule instances re-validate clean

outputs.description: schemas/deliverable.schema.json v1.0.0 → v1.1.0 — same constraint applied.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing deliverable instances re-validate clean

outputs.description: schema-refs.json regenerated to reflect rule + deliverable version bumps.
RULE-CI-DOCUMENTED-OVERRIDE-NOT-COMPLIANCE-1 promoted via canonical mechanism: version 1.0.0 → 1.1.0, tierState.activeTier flipped working-model → automated, transition appended with evidenceClass.
acceptanceCriteria: New transition: from working-model, to automated, evidenceClass populated

outputs.description: Prospective deliverable spec — S4 → S5 → S6 across dispatch; S7/S8 post-merge amendment.

preMerge: Step 2 substrate gate: zero existing instances violate the new constraint (24 scanned)
rule.schema.json and deliverable.schema.json compile under new versions with allOf reference
All existing instances re-validate against updated schemas
Negative test: instance with 'override' field rejected by rule and deliverable schemas
Rule promotion validates against rule.schema.json v1.2.0
postMerge: main shows rule.schema.json v1.2.0 and deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0

transitions.trigger: Dispatch authored after FU-D-2 close (6ae35c7); second rule promotion in FU block; completes CI-gating axis pair

notes: Second rule promotion in the post-foundation FU block. Different mechanism from FU-D-2: schema-constraint (structural) rather than CI workflow (runtime). Demonstrates the rule schema's design allowing rule-specific automation surfaces — each rule's terminal tier mechanism is rule-specific, not one-size-fits-all. Completes the CI-gating axis pair (RULE-CI-UNSTABLE + RULE-CI-DOCUMENTED-OVERRIDE). Substrate gate scanned 24 instances (19 deliverables including EB session additions, 5 rules); zero violations.
